mapper.sql: tes.id, tes.from_user, tes.host, tes.pass, tes.port, tes.username, tes.need_auth_flag, tes.ssl_enable_flag, tes.priority_level, tes.enabled_flag, tes.attribute1, tes.attribute2, tes.attribute3, tes.attribute4, tes.attribute5, tes.server_name, tes.description, tes.create_time, tes.update_by, tes.create_by, tes.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.from_user as ${tAlias}_from_user, ${tAlias}.host as ${tAlias}_host, ${tAlias}.pass as ${tAlias}_pass, ${tAlias}.port as ${tAlias}_port, ${tAlias}.username as ${tAlias}_username, ${tAlias}.need_auth_flag as ${tAlias}_need_auth_flag, ${tAlias}.ssl_enable_flag as ${tAlias}_ssl_enable_flag, ${tAlias}.priority_level as ${tAlias}_priority_level, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.server_name as ${tAlias}_server_name, ${tAlias}.description as ${tAlias}_description, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time
mapper.insert: insert into tool_email_server (from_user, host, pass, port, username, need_auth_flag, ssl_enable_flag, priority_level, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, server_name, description, create_time, update_by, create_by, update_time) values (#{fromUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{host,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{port,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{needAuthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{sslEnableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{priorityLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update tool_email_server set from_user = #{fromUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, host = #{host,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pass = #{pass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, port = #{port,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, need_auth_flag = #{needAuthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, ssl_enable_flag = #{sslEnableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, priority_level = #{priorityLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, server_name = #{serverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
